en: I love my wife, I'm very attracted to my wife but when she was fucking really pregnant she was like
she's five foot two, she's under a hundred pounds, she gained no weight,
all she gained was a big fucking pot belly. She looked like fucking ET man.
So I had this fucking horny ET
just following me around the house like, where are you going to fuck today,
where are you going to fuck today and I'm like oh my god no.
